name: DevvStream Corp.
business: DevvStream Corp. is a capex-light environmental asset generation company that develops and manages technology-based sustainability projects. It sells carbon credits and International Renewable Energy Certificates (I-RECs) to corporations and governments seeking to offset emissions. It also provides project management services for carbon credit generation.
namedSuppliers: Companhia de Desenvolvimento de Servi os Ambientais do Acre S/A

exposures.sentence: We provide exposure to environmental assets such as carbon credits used to offset emissions of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases and International Renewable Energy Certificates (I-RECs), which allow organizations to claim renewable energy usage and demonstrate progress toward decarbonization goals.
Our business model is focused on two forms of carbon credit generation activity: our direct investment model and our project management model.
We have an EV charging project in development that targets operators and owners of EV charging stations and networks within North America. Revenue from this project is expected in 2026.
We continue to evaluate the potential use of blockchain technology to enhance transparency, data integrity, and auditability within our environmental asset projects.

We have agreed, subject to certain exceptions contained in the Helena Note Purchase Agreement, to use 75% of the net proceeds from the sale of Helena Convertible Notes (70% of the Initial Tranche) to purchase Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana or other utility-based digital assets (collectively, Digital Assets).

The acquisition of an equity interest in MSP enhances our ability to generate long-term revenue from carbon credit markets and fortifies its competitive positioning as a leader in sustainability-focused investments.

Energy Efficient Technologies (EET) Partnership... DevvStream will receive revenue from verified carbon and renewable-energy credits generated through EET projects and share in independently validated utility-bill savings.

catalysts.event: Revenue from EV charging project expected
catalysts.sentence: Revenue from this project is expected in 2026.
On November 6, 2024, we completed the business combination with FIAC, pursuant to the Business Combination Agreement.
DevvStream Corp's common shares commenced trading on the NASDAQ Capital Market under the new ticker symbol DEVS on November 7, 2024.
On August 8, 2025, we filed Articles of Amendment with the Registrar of Corporations (Alberta) to effect a Reverse Stock Split of our issued and outstanding Common Shares at a ratio of one for ten.

catalysts.event: Amendment to Devvio partnership establishing token program
catalysts.sentence: On October 28, 2025, DevvStream entered in a fourth amendment to the Strategic Partnership Agreement... The Amendment establishes a Strategic Token Program between the parties whereby DevvStream agrees to purchase DevvE tokens annually in the amount of $1,000,000 in 2025 and $1,270,00 in each of 2026 and 2027.

catalysts.event: Start of dollar cost averaging purchases of BTC and SOL
catalysts.sentence: On August 1, 2025, the Company began making systematic dollar cost averaging purchases from the BitGo custodial account, allocating the value of all such purchases equally between BTC and SOL.

tamClaims.claim: Nature-based solutions could contribute about 20% of mitigation needed between now and 2050, while 80% must come from technology-based solutions.
tamClaims.sentence: Recent studies done by American University shows that nature-based solutions will only contribute 20% of the carbon reductions needed to meet our global net zero goals. The other 80% needs to come from technology, which is where we plan to target.
